headline: Carnival’s Fleet Expansion and New Miami Campus Could Be A Game Changer For Carnival Corporation & (CCL)
summary: In recent days, Carnival Corporation’s Princess Cruises brand marked the past arrival of next-generation ship Star Princess in Seattle for her inaugural Alaska season, while Carnival also began construction on a new global headquarters campus in Miami designed to consolidate over 2,000 North American shoreside employees by 2028. At the same time, Carnival advanced long-term capacity and sustainability plans with new LNG-powered Voyager-class ship orders and biofuel trials, even as it...

headline: Cunard Unveils 190 New Voyages in 2028 including Historic Four Queens Celebration
summary: Cunard – the British luxury cruise brand renowned for 185 years of delivering elegance at sea – has announced its 2028 program, featuring 190 extraordinary voyages in 36 countries, including the historic Four Queens Celebration in May 2028. thumbnail.caption: Cunard’s Queen Victoria to make four maiden calls for the iconic fleet in Scotland, Norway and Italy.

headline: Northcoast Just Yanked Norwegian Cruise Line From Its Buy List: Iran War Sinks the Cruise Industry
summary: Northcoast Research has pulled Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) from its Buy list, downgrading the stock to Neutral on May 6. The firm cited a slower-than-expected balance sheet transformation and an industry backdrop made worse by the war in Iran. The analyst downgrade lands one day after price target cuts from Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, Barclays, ... Northcoast Just Yanked Norwegian Cruise Line From Its Buy List: Iran War Sinks the Cruise Industry
